description: Dr. Jennifer Liang Clinic was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Kingsfoil Acupuncture was born from Dr. Jennifer Liang's deep conviction that true healing addresses the whole person, not just symptoms. After completing her Master's in Traditional Chinese Medicine at ACTCM in San Francisco in 2010, Dr. Liang felt called to bring authentic TCM practices to the Hudson Valley community of Goshen, where families could access time-tested healing modalities in a welcoming, professional environment.

For over 16 years, our clinic has served as a bridge between ancient wisdom and modern wellness needs. We've witnessed countless patients discover relief from chronic pain, anxiety, respiratory issues, and women's health concerns through the gentle yet powerful interventions of acupuncture, herbal medicine, and complementary TCM therapies. Each treatment plan is carefully crafted to honor the individual's unique constitution and life circumstances.

Rooted in the Goshen community, Kingsfoil Acupuncture has become a trusted sanctuary where healing happens naturally. We believe that when qi flows freely through the body's meridian system, profound restoration becomes possible, allowing our patients to reclaim their vitality and live with greater harmony and purpose.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Jennifer Liang, L.Ac., NCCAOM, brings 16 years of dedicated practice in Traditional Chinese Medicine to her patients in Goshen and throughout the Hudson Valley. She earned her Master of Science in Traditional Chinese Medicine from the American College of Traditional Chinese Medicine in San Francisco in 2010, where she trained under renowned TCM masters and developed her deep understanding of classical Chinese medical theory. Her board certification through the National Certification Commission for Acupuncture and Oriental Medicine reflects her commitment to the highest standards of professional practice.

Dr. Liang has developed particular expertise in pain management, mental health support, women's health, anxiety and panic disorders, respiratory conditions, and immune system strengthening. Her approach seamlessly weaves together multiple TCM modalities – from precise acupuncture point selection to custom herbal formulations, therapeutic tuina massage, and personalized dietary recommendations. She believes that each patient carries their own innate wisdom for healing, and her role is to gently guide the body back to its natural state of balance.

What sets Dr. Liang apart is her ability to listen deeply to both what patients say and what their bodies reveal through pulse diagnosis and tongue examination. She takes time to understand each person's unique pattern of disharmony, creating treatment plans that address root causes rather than merely managing symptoms. Her patients often describe feeling truly heard and cared for, experiencing not just physical relief but a renewed sense of wholeness and vitality.
profile.name: Dr. Jennifer Liang
profile.quote: The body holds infinite wisdom for healing – my role is simply to help restore the natural flow of qi that allows that wisdom to flourish.
profile.title: L.Ac., NCCAOM

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Jennifer Liang addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Jennifer Liang takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Jennifer Liang collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Jennifer Liang's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Jennifer Liang has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)
